descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-4 in Game 7 of Abbott Cup series to advance to Centennial Cup tournament.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes won the Abbott Cup best-of-seven series four games to three over the visiting Humboldt Broncos, with Dave Tomlinson scoring the series-clinching goal with 2:37 remaining in Game 7 on Wednesday night. The tightly contested series saw each team win two one-goal games, with Richmond outscoring Humboldt 26-24 overall. Humboldt coach Bernie Lynch praised his team's effort despite the loss, noting the Centennial Cup tournament officially opens in Humboldt on Friday.

attribution.headline: Richmond Sockeyes Win Abbott Cup, Edge Humboldt 5-4
